mapper.select: SELECT n.notification_id AS notificationId, n.trip_id AS tripId, n.receiver_id AS receiverId, n.sender_id AS senderId, n.message, n.type, n.is_read AS isRead, TO_CHAR(n.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, CASE WHEN (SYSDATE - CAST(n.created_at AS DATE)) * 24 * 60 < 1 THEN '방금 전' WHEN (SYSDATE - CAST(n.created_at AS DATE)) * 24 * 60 < 60 THEN FLOOR((SYSDATE - CAST(n.created_at AS DATE)) * 24 * 60) || '분 전' WHEN (SYSDATE - CAST(n.created_at AS DATE)) * 24 < 24 THEN FLOOR((SYSDATE - CAST(n.created_at AS DATE)) * 24) || '시간 전' ELSE FLOOR(SYSDATE - CAST(n.created_at AS DATE)) || '일 전' END AS timeAgo FROM trip_notification n WHERE n.trip_id = #{tripId} AND n.receiver_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 30 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE trip_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId}
UPDATE trip_notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND receiver_id = #{memberId} AND is_read = 0
